title: Bitcoin rebounds to $71K as oil drops after Trump signals pause on Iran strikes
summary: Bitcoin moved back above $71,000 after US President Donald Trump postponed Iran strike for five days, sending oil price crashing below $100.

title: How a ‘Wrong Number’ message turned into a $3.4M crypto scam
summary: A simple “wrong number” message led to a $3.4 million crypto scam, exposing social engineering tactics, fake investments and fund laundering methods.

title: Siren token surges 340% in 7 days, draws scrutiny over concentrated supply
summary: Arkham data shows a wallet cluster holding 644 million SIREN, about 88% of the 728 million circulating supply, raising manipulation concerns.

title: Strategy adds 1,031 Bitcoin for $77M as holdings top 762,000 BTC
summary: Strategy bought 1,031 Bitcoin for $76.6 million, lifting holdings to 762,099 BTC, as the company relied on common stock sales to fund the purchase.

title: Airdrops rewarded extraction and ended real communities
summary: Airdrops trained extraction over loyalty. Token sales return with privacy-preserving identity to reward conviction and build real, automation-resistant communities.

title: Bitcoin price jumps above $70,000 as US announces shock pause on Iran strikes
summary: Bitcoin climbed back above $70,000 after President Donald Trump said the United States had held “productive conversations” with Iran and would postpone planned strikes on Iranian power plants and energy infrastructure for five days. title: Stablecoins seen gaining from AI payments despite slow uptake: Bernstein
summary: Stablecoins could benefit from the rise of AI-driven payments over time, even as early adoption remains limited and contested, according to a new report.

title: Bitcoin focus flips from oil to bonds as US and Japan 10-year yields spike into a critical week
summary: Bond markets, not oil alone, may decide Bitcoin’s fate this week The market is still treating oil as the center of the current macro shock. title: The SEC just gave crypto its clearest win in years, but much of it could still be reversed
summary: The crypto industry finally got the clear lines it spent years demanding from Washington. title: Why crypto hacks don’t end and continue even when the money is gone
summary: A crypto hack never ends when the wallet is drained. The theft lands first, fast and visible, and then a slower collapse starts to work through the rest of the project. summary: The Pentagon has sent the White House a request for $200 billion in additional funding for the Iran war, a figure that would equal nearly 3 million Bitcoin at current market prices. title: $1 Billion Floods Back Into Crypto Funds, Snapping Five-Week $4B Bleed
summary: CoinShares reported $1 billion weekly turnaround, driven by Bitcoin buying and renewed investor appetite across major markets.
